	Apontamentos das aulas, fornecidos aos alunos
methodology: Use of practical examples related to reviewing research articles suggested by the students during the class and feedback for their specific documents for a reseach proposal.
organicUnit: ECATI - School of Communication, Architecture, Arts and Information Technologies
presentation: The scope of this unit encompasses the development of a research methodology essential to the attainment of high-quality results. Namely, it seeks to transmit a set of methods, of paramount importance to the research process, and, to familiarize the student, not only with such methods, but also, in an immersive way, with their application in real context of dissemination and review of scientific results. The pertinence of this unit is then clear: It constitutes a foundation, theoretical and practical, where all further research work is set upon.
